title: Drop the Rock - No tree punching Compat and Customization
description: A custom compat for No Tree Punching can drop loose rock in vanilla or modded stone. Fully customizable for add rock and cobblestone or saws, knifes and mattock modded.
body:
This Mod allows compatibility to No Tree Punching!
In version 1.12 of No Tree Punching when you broke granite or any rock you got loose rocks instead of cobblestone or rock, this feature was dropped in 1.16 and this Mod adds it back in newest version.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QJ491IVy/images/e9b8922544fbd36cf05d40f05b35efeddcb84f51.png)
Require [No Tree Punching](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-tree-punching)

Compatibility with Oh The Biomes You'll Go (We've Gone for 1.20.1) 🍏

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QJ491IVy/images/df24a1795c4887d6245cfd6ffca35c3126c6cdf3.png)

Compatibility with Quark 🌸

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QJ491IVy/images/12f6176050a46a5fcd8852772d93db9f76849269.png)

Compatibility with Biomes O' Plenty 🌴

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QJ491IVy/images/23cad2b124d7f9e004a7affa8b63e07ec3772dfb.png)

The new 2.0 version include :

 - New Cobblestone
  
  ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QJ491IVy/images/dda85c8362cfb131a19fa603a40671a9f150748c.png)
  
 - New Tool Compat with Ice and Fire
  
  ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QJ491IVy/images/9ec7b4e9cf6335561ddccf92296e1c9006d8b4ad.png)
  
 - New Enchantment Lithofusion allows drop directly cobblestone instead of loose rocks
  
  ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QJ491IVy/images/9564f6e1afedff623f834264f89742df4fe6188d.png)
  
 - New Customization for rock and more (check [wiki](https://github.com/Samlegamer/Drop-the-Rock/wiki) 👀)
  
  ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QJ491IVy/images/f8da130696dc270811f8294ad9aa5f2a216c2b55.png)

Feel free to include it in your Modpack 😄
